productDisplayName: Nike Men Blue FFF Football Jersey
description: Style NoteDesigned for your training needs, this nike jersey is made of polyester fabric with Dri-Fit technology to offer absolute sweat-free, fresh comfort. Such properties make it ideal not just for training, but playing any sport even on a hot day. Team this with performance shorts and sports shoes, or tracks and floaters for an unparalleled cool look.Product DetailsBlue striped FFF jersey, mandarin neck with a two button concealed placket, short sleeves, Nike swooshon the right chest and French Football Federation logo on the left chestMaterial and Care100% polyesterMachine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergentDo not bleachTumble dry lowCool iron do not iron on decorationsSize and fitRegular fit
